title: Structured model/agent rule block
description: One atomic instruction. Prefer short, verifiable rule_text; use examples and negative_examples as string arrays.

priority.description: e.g. critical | high | medium | low (free string allowed)

scope.description: Where the rule applies, e.g. code_edit | chat | workflow

rule_text.description: Single atomic instruction the model can follow

validation.description: Optional machine-oriented hook id, e.g. edit_blocked_if_full_read_not_confirmed
